creator: vendion@gmail.com
text:
Running Kontact 19.12.2 on FreeBSD 12.1-p2 when I try to access the settings window Kontact crashes with a Segmentaiton fault.

Console output:

QStandardPaths: XDG_RUNTIME_DIR not set, defaulting to '/tmp/runtime-vendion'
QStandardPaths: XDG_RUNTIME_DIR not set, defaulting to '/tmp/runtime-vendion'
qt5ct: using qt5ct plugin
qt5ct: D-Bus global menu: no
QStandardPaths: XDG_RUNTIME_DIR not set, defaulting to '/tmp/runtime-vendion'
org.kde.pim.kdepimdbusinterface: Couldn't find autostart/korgac.desktop!
kf5.kxmlgui: cannot find .rc file "kontactsummary_part.rc" for component "kontact"
No such XML file "/home/vendion/.local/share/kontact/default-.rc"
*** KMail got signal 11 (Exiting)
*** Dead letters dumped.
/tmp/messageviewer_qrYfRt.html was removed .
/tmp/messageviewer_rovQEt.html was removed .
QSocketNotifier: Invalid socket 10 and type 'Read', disabling...

QSocketNotifier: Invalid socket 65 and type 'Read', disabling...
QSocketNotifier: Invalid socket 90 and type 'Read', disabling...
QSocketNotifier: Invalid socket 97 and type 'Read', disabling...

QSocketNotifier: Invalid socket 101 and type 'Read', disabling...

QSocketNotifier: Invalid socket 107 and type 'Read', disabling...
QSocketNotifier: Invalid socket 108 and type 'Read', disabling...
QSocketNotifier: Invalid socket 112 and type 'Read', disabling...
KCrash: crashing... crashRecursionCounter = 2
KCrash: Application Name = kontact path = /usr/local/bin pid = 40682
KCrash: Arguments: /usr/local/bin/kontact

Link to the core dump file since it is fairly large (445 MB) and cannot be attached to the bug. https://drive.google.com/file/d/138W6F8a9sFLudCXv25ZUwyemQBqIlnzA/view?usp=sharing
